creator: vanhu@netasq.com
text:
On Thu, Nov 16, 2006 at 04:00:29PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of security/ipsec-tools,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/105606 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/105606

Hi.

I just recompiled the port with STAT enabled, and it compiles without
problems.

Guess your problem is more complicated than that, I'll have a look at
the exact compile error message to try to find the real problem.


Yvan.
